ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., sensor, actuator, PLC) */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site or location where the device is installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (online/offline) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was installed */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date when the device was last maintained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type FOREIGN KEY ("device_type") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Information about compatible devices or systems */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device type the attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the attribute (e.g., INT, BOOL, STRING) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the attribute (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit, etc.) */,
  "attribute_range" TEXT /* Acceptable range of values for the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_attributes_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the configuration belongs to */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute being configured */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES device_attributes ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the data comes from */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute being measured */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., temperature, humidity, etc.) */,
  "data_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES device_attributes ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that triggered the alarm */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alarm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alarm */,
  "alarm_type" TEXT /* Type of alarm (e.g., critical, warning, etc.) */,
  "acknowledged" TEXT /* Indicator whether the alarm has been acknowledged */,
  "cleared" TEXT /* Indicator whether the alarm has been cleared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Secure hash of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "access_granted" TEXT /* Indicator whether access was granted */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Description of the reason for the access attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
